evidence_quotes.quote: they only sell me the license to play their games and can revoke these licenses at any given time for any reason
many games and services, which i have paid for, have been discontinued or destroyed
I still want to play / own the games i have already paid for
game publishers should include some end of lifetime plans for games.

paragraphs.text: Im a passionate gamer since forever and many games and services, which i have paid for, have been discontinued or destroyed for example Overwatch by Blizzard or The Crew by Ubisoft. Im scared of the future where companies only sell me the license to play their games and can revoke these licenses at any given time for any reason (for example Nintendo or Steam). I still want to play / own the games i have already paid for and game publishers should include some end of lifetime plans for games. Thank you.
